headline: Alphabet Faces Gemini Lawsuit While Deepening Healthcare AI Role With CVS
summary: A wrongful death lawsuit has been filed against Alphabet (NasdaqGS:GOOGL), alleging its Gemini AI chatbot contributed to a user's suicide. The claim is reported to be the first legal case directly tied to Google's AI tools and their role in a death. At the same time, Alphabet announced a new healthcare AI partnership with CVS Health focused on a real time consumer engagement platform. Alphabet, the parent of Google and Gemini, is a central player in large scale consumer AI and cloud...

headline: Oscar Health’s CEO Says 2026 Is the Year It Finally Turns a Profit — Here’s What He’s Betting On
summary: Oscar Health (NYSE:OSCR) CEO Mark Bertolini has been making the same promise for four consecutive quarters: 2026 is the year the company turns profitable. Now, with the Q4 2025 results in hand, we can see exactly what he’s betting on to make that happen. The headline numbers from Q4 were rough. EPS came in at ...
